text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We have huge losses in Lebanon. It is true that as a resistance and as a Lebanese people, the losses are huge, but these losses are due to the occupation" @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "Do you know that after the sixty-day agreement, which said that the Israeli enemy would leave Lebanon, the extent of the destruction they caused was twice more then the 66 day war itself?” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘我们在黎巴嫩遭受了巨大损失。作为抵抗力量和黎巴嫩人民，损失确实巨大，但这些损失是占领造成的。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：“你知道吗，在规定以色列敌人离开黎巴嫩的六十天协议之后，他们造成的破坏程度是66天战争本身的两倍多？” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 Bloomberg: Chevron Corporation is set to expand its presence in Venezuela, with the government in Caracas preparing to award the company additional oil fields as part of a broader push to revive the country’s energy sector. Chevron, which maintained operations in Venezuela for nearly two decades despite sanctions and instability, is now positioned to benefit from new policies aimed at opening the oil sector to international companies and boosting production. The expansion comes during the Iran war, which has disrupted Middle Eastern supply and driven global energy concerns, increasing the strategic importance of Venezuela’s vast oil reserves. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 彭博社：雪佛龙公司准备扩大其在委内瑞拉的业务，加拉加斯政府正准备授予该公司额外的油田，作为振兴该国能源行业更广泛推动力的一部分。雪佛龙尽管面临制裁和不稳定，但在委内瑞拉维持了近二十年的运营，现在正准备从旨在向国际公司开放石油行业并提高产量的新政策中受益。此次扩张正值伊朗战争期间，这场战争扰乱了中东供应并引发了全球能源担忧，增加了委内瑞拉庞大石油储备的战略重要性。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇱🇱🇧⚡️Israel-Lebanon Talks Set to Begin Tomorrow in Washington at 2:00 p.m. GMT — Zionist media confirms first in-person preparatory meeting at U.S. State Department" 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Meeting That Will Forever Change Lebanon As we approach the conclusion of Hezbollah Secretary General’s address, an indirect warning has been made. This meeting with Israel will only serve as a direct stab in the backs of Hezbollah. Israel’s goal to encircle Hezbollah from all sides is at play. Should this meeting take place, Hezbollah’s rhetoric will change and the attitude and considerations will follow suit. Shame on the Lebanese government who no longer hides behind the cover of seeking “stability”. But directly making itself an outright enemy of all shia and resistance supporting Lebanese citizens. No matter the outcome, Hezbollah will fight until its last breath. For they are the sons of Husayn (as) and students of Karbala. Never to humiliation!
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇱🇱🇧⚡️以色列-黎巴嫩会谈定于明天格林威治标准时间下午2:00在华盛顿开始——犹太复国主义媒体证实了在美国国务院举行的首次面对面筹备会议” 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 这场将永远改变黎巴嫩的会议。随着真主党秘书长演讲的结束，一个间接的警告已经发出。这次与以色列的会议只会成为对真主党背后直接的刺伤。以色列从四面八方包围真主党的目标正在发挥作用。如果这次会议举行，真主党的言论将会改变，态度和考量也会随之改变。黎巴嫩政府不再躲在寻求“稳定”的幌子后面，而是直接让自己成为所有什叶派和支持抵抗的黎巴嫩公民的公开敌人，真可耻。无论结果如何，真主党都将战斗到最后一口气。因为他们是侯赛因（愿主福安之）的子孙和卡尔巴拉的学生。绝不屈辱！

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇦🇫 🇨🇳 Balochistan Liberation Army fighters killed three Pakistan Coast Guard personnel on Sunday in the first-ever attack on one of the maritime authority's patrol boats operating in the Arabian Sea. The banned separatist group Balochistan Liberation Army claimed responsibility for the attack, stating it marks a new development in their military strategy. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇦🇫 🇨🇳 俾路支解放军武装分子周日杀死了三名巴基斯坦海岸警卫队人员，这是该海事机构在阿拉伯海巡逻的巡逻艇首次遭到袭击。被取缔的分离主义组织俾路支解放军声称对此次袭击负责，称这标志着其军事战略的新发展。 @wfwitness

text: Spot Brent rises to $132.46 and spot Oman rises to $139.08. Actual oil, not paper oil, is currently $130+ per barrel.
text_zh: 现货布伦特原油升至132.46美元，现货阿曼原油升至139.08美元。实际石油，而非纸面石油，目前每桶价格在130美元以上。

text: WarMonitor If that's what he saw, which is BS BTW, he has bigger problems upstairs than I thought. Reporter: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? Trump: It wasn't a depiction. I did post it and I thought it was me as a doctor. And had to do with red cross as a red cross worker, which we support and only the fake news could come up with that one. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2043731872757493835/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 如果那是他看到的，顺便说一句，那是胡说八道，他楼上的问题比我想象的要大。记者：你发布了那张你自己被描绘成耶稣基督的照片吗？特朗普：那不是描绘。我确实发布了它，我以为那是我作为一名医生。并且与红十字会有关，作为一名红十字会工作人员，我们支持这一点，只有假新闻才能想出那个。 https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2043731872757493835/video/1 - Acyn 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah Secretary General: “We will not surrender. Will tackle the (Israeli) aggression” (So far, since Hezbollah entered the war, multiple Hezbollah towns have been taken by the IDF, approximately 1,500 Hezbollah members have been eliminated, and 6,400 Lebanese have been wounded.) tweet

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem calls on the Lebanese government to cancel Tuesday’s meeting with Israeli officials in Washington. Is that a threat? There is a clear risk that Lebanese politicians could be targeted. Hezbollah’s Qassem in his speech: Lebanese government diplomacy "did not lead to anything." Claims Hezbollah's intervention in the war prevented a surprise Israeli attack on Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043746657976602892/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 最新消息 🔴 真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆呼吁黎巴嫩政府取消周二在华盛顿与以色列官员的会议。这是一个威胁吗？黎巴嫩政客可能成为目标的风险很明显。真主党的卡西姆在演讲中说：黎巴嫩政府的外交“没有导致任何结果”。声称真主党对战争的干预阻止了以色列对黎巴嫩的突然袭击。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043746657976602892/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) REPORTER: Bishop Robert Barron says you owe Pope Leo an apology. Will you apologize? US PRESIDENT TRUMP: No, I don't, because Pope Leo said things that are wrong. He was very much against what I'm doing with regard to Iran, and you cannot have a nuclear Iran. Pope Leo would not be happy with the end result. You'd have hundreds of millions of people dead... I think he's very weak on crime. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）记者：罗伯特·巴伦主教说你欠利奥教皇一个道歉。你会道歉吗？美国总统特朗普：不，我不会，因为利奥教皇说的话是错误的。他非常反对我在伊朗问题上所做的事情，你不能拥有一个核伊朗。利奥教皇不会对最终结果感到高兴。你会让数亿人死亡……我认为他在犯罪问题上非常软弱。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 🚀 🇯🇵 🇺🇸 Japan will conduct the first combat test of the Tomahawk missile from a destroyer This summer, the Japanese Navy plans to conduct the first training and combat launch of the Tomahawk cruise missile from the destroyer JS Chokai (DDG-176)in the eastern part of the Pacific Ocean with the support of the US Navy's 3rd Fleet. The event will be a key stage in Japan's transition to the concept of counterstrike and expanding its capabilities for long-range high-precision strikes. 🔷 The test will follow the delivery of the first batch of Tomahawk missiles in March, confirmed by Defense Minister S. Koizumi. The Atago-class destroyer JS Chokai has undergone modernization, including the adaptation of Mk.41 vertical launch systems (VLS), the upgrade of the combat information system, and integration with American targeting networks. The Tomahawk cruise missile (BGM-109 Tomahawk) has a range of over 1000–1300 km and is equipped with a warhead weighing about 450 kg, enabling high-precision strikes on protected targets. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转推 @StatWatch25：🚀 🇯🇵 🇺🇸 日本将从驱逐舰上进行战斧导弹的首次战斗测试。今年夏天，日本海军计划在美军第三舰队的支持下，在太平洋东部从驱逐舰“鸟海”号（DDG-176）上进行战斧巡航导弹的首次训练和战斗发射。此次活动将是日本向反击概念过渡并扩大其远程高精度打击能力的关键阶段。 🔷 此次测试将在国防大臣小泉进次郎确认的3月份交付首批战斧导弹之后进行。爱宕级驱逐舰“鸟海”号已经进行了现代化改造，包括适配Mk.41垂直发射系统（VLS）、升级作战信息系统以及与美国目标网络集成。战斧巡航导弹（BGM-109战斧）射程超过1000-1300公里，配备约450公斤的弹头，能够对受保护的目标进行高精度打击。 推文

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “ We responded at the appropriate time and found that this was the right moment to proceed with implementing the agreement; it was then discovered that a massive aggressive plan had been prepared for Lebanon. We deprived the enemy of catching us by surprise and inflicting the very heavy losses that could have occurred. The enemy's goals are clear: to destroy the strength that Lebanon possesses as a prelude to "Greater Israel." For the record, all of Lebanon is targeted; when Israel occupies southern Lebanon, it means it is occupying Lebanon, and when it exerts pressure and spreads its killing across Lebanese territories, it means all of Lebanon is targeted. In the event of aggression, the Lebanese state is supposed to resist and task its army and forces to confront the aggression.”
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“我们在适当的时候做出了回应，并发现这是推进执行协议的正确时机；随后发现为黎巴嫩准备了一个大规模的侵略计划。我们剥夺了敌人让我们措手不及并造成可能发生的非常沉重损失的机会。敌人的目标很明确：摧毁黎巴嫩拥有的力量，作为“大以色列”的前奏。记录在案，整个黎巴嫩都是目标；当以色列占领黎巴嫩南部时，意味着它正在占领黎巴嫩，当它施加压力并在黎巴嫩领土上散布杀戮时，意味着整个黎巴嫩都是目标。如果发生侵略，黎巴嫩国家应该进行抵抗，并指派其军队和部队对抗侵略。”

text: Open Source Intel Former Brazilian intelligence chief Alexandre Ramagem has been arrested by ICE in the U.S. Ramagem fled Brazil in September after being convicted for plotting a coup with former President Jair Bolsonaro. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043745323231724010/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel The naval blockade has been in full force for 3.5 hours. The IRGC had threatened it would began a harsh response, as well targeting the gulf ports. So far nothing. If they do not begin attacks, that may indicate that the regime has folded and will get back to the negotiating table. I still believe the gaps are extremely wide. They will need to give up the uranium, end terror proxy support and open up the strait. I’m feeling like the U.S. will get back to the negotiating table. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 海上封锁已全面实施3.5小时。伊斯兰革命卫队曾威胁要开始严厉回应，并瞄准海湾港口。到目前为止什么都没有。如果他们不开始攻击，这可能表明政权已经屈服，并将回到谈判桌。我仍然认为差距非常大。他们将需要放弃铀，结束对恐怖代理人的支持并开放海峡。我觉得美国会回到谈判桌。 - 开源情报 推文

text: OSINTdefender District Judge Darrin P. Gayles, in a 17-page decision today, entirely dismissed a defamation lawsuit filed by U.S. President Donald J. Trump against the Wall Street Journal, Rupert Murdoch, CEO Robert Thomson and reporters Khadeeja Safdar and Joe Palazzolo, for their reporting on a creepy letter he purportedly wrote to commemorate the 50th birthday of convicted sex offender and trafficker Jeffrey Epstein in 2003. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 地区法官达林·P·盖尔斯在今天的一份17页的裁决中，完全驳回了美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普对《华尔街日报》、鲁珀特·默多克、首席执行官罗伯特·汤姆森以及记者卡迪贾·萨夫达尔和乔·帕拉佐洛提起的诽谤诉讼，原因是他们报道了他据称在2003年为纪念被定罪的性犯罪者和人口贩子杰弗里·爱泼斯坦50岁生日而写的一封令人毛骨悚然的信。 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | Despite Trump’s orders to impose a naval blockade on Iranian ports and prevent ships from entering/exiting Iranian ports, oil tankers are still loading oil in Iran and are leaving these terminals, without interruption. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | 尽管特朗普下令对伊朗港口实施海上封锁并阻止船只进出伊朗港口，但油轮仍在伊朗装载石油并离开这些码头，没有中断。 @FotrosResistancee

text: ❗️ Sheikh Naim is speaking right now
text_zh: ❗️ 纳伊姆谢赫现在正在发言

text: 🇷🇺 Dmitry Medvedev comments on the blocking of the blockade. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 德米特里·梅德韦杰夫评论封锁的封锁。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡️ Israel-Lebanon Talks Set to Begin Tomorrow in Washington at 2:00 p.m. GMT — Zionist media confirms first in-person preparatory meeting at U.S. State Department
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 以色列-黎巴嫩会谈定于明天格林威治标准时间下午2:00在华盛顿开始——犹太复国主义媒体证实了在美国国务院举行的首次面对面筹备会议
